model_comparison: Both models achieve perfect content accuracy and natural fluency. The decisive factor is the adherence to the specific paralinguistic feature '明亮的音质' (bright tone quality). Model 2, on the other hand, exhibits a distinctly brighter timbre with more energy, crispness, and an uplifting emotional tone (a 'smiling voice') that captures the essence of the prompt much more effectively.
